# Meta-Agent Template (Removed)

The `meta-agent` template no longer exists.

Available templates are: `minimal`, `coder`, `browser`, `web-research`.

```bash
co create my-agent --template minimal
co create my-coder --template coder
co create my-browser --template browser
co create my-researcher --template web-research
```

See [Templates README](README.md) for the current template list.
